title: YTP:  Halloween the 13th on Elm Street II Return of the Day of the Night of the Dawn of the Dead
description:
Just like the original it has no budget... and not so good effects.
Are high schoolers too old to trick-or-treat?
Special thanks to MisterGiygas for the audio of Link saying taco and fat king.  It  came from his video Hey King.
Video sources:
Hotel Mario 
Zelda CD-i 
Megaman cartoon
Audio sources:
Monster Mash 
Super Metroid Ambient Silence 
Eddsworld Halloween special (1st one)
Luigi's Mansion title screen
Thriller by Micheal Jackson RIP
Here Comes the Sun by the Beatles
Nooo.... GUTMAN'S *#$ by GekkouKitsune
